signIn.title: Access your account
signIn.subtitle: Everything you need to build and ship.
signIn.googleError: Could not authenticate with Google. Try again.
signIn.authError: Could not authenticate. Please try again shortly.

devLogin.title: Quick login
devLogin.hint: Available only in local development. Click a user to sign in instantly.
devLogin.empty: No users found in the database. Run the seed script to create test data.
devLogin.error: Could not load users. Check that the API is running.

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Start using the platform in seconds
register.passwordWeak: The password doesn't meet all requirements.
register.googleError: Could not create account with Google. Try again.
register.createError: Could not create the account. Try again.
register.inviteSubtitle: You've been invited to a team
register.inviteInvalid: This invite is invalid or has expired.
register.inviteEmailMismatch: The e-mail used ({{googleEmail}}) does not match the invited e-mail ({{inviteEmail}}).
register.inviteForOtherEmail: This invite is for {{inviteEmail}}. Sign out of the current account to continue.

selectAccount.title: Choose an account
selectAccount.subtitle: You have access to more than one account. Select which one to sign in to.

forgotPassword.title: Recover password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your account email and we'll send you a link to create a new password.
forgotPassword.requestError: Could not send the link. Please try again shortly.
forgotPassword.sentMessage: If an account exists for {{email}}, we've sent a recovery link.
forgotPassword.sentHint: Check your inbox (and spam folder). The link expires in 1 hour.

resetPassword.title: Create a new password
resetPassword.subtitle: Choose a strong password to access your account.
resetPassword.passwordWeak: The password doesn't meet all requirements.
resetPassword.success: Password reset successfully. Sign in with your new password.
resetPassword.missingToken: Invalid or missing link. Please request a new recovery link.

verifyEmail.title: Confirm your email
verifyEmail.subtitle: We sent a 6-digit code to your email. Enter it below to continue.
verifyEmail.subtitleWithEmail: We sent a 6-digit code to {{email}}. Enter it below to continue.
verifyEmail.resendSuccess: We sent a new code to your email.
verifyEmail.sendError: Could not send the code. Please try again.
